TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ow-ma-al.Pin.Ha-ta-pu Ow-ma-al.Pin.Ha-ta-pu "/'o äm…Ďňźr/; A-la-pow:ōĻŔÖōĪ ō®ŔÜ ōßŔĄōģō∑ōßō®‚Äé 'Umar ibn al-KhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀb (' ēom…Ďr-, ' ē äm…Ďr …™bn alx…Ďtň§'tň§…Ďňźb)Ôľõ584 a mihcaan katukuh 644 a mihca 11 a bulad 3 a demiad" pabelinen aca Ow-may-al, Ow-ma-al,Wo-ma-ya, u Iy-s-lan-cya i likisiay sepat tabakiay a Ha-li-baay nu sakatusa a iluc "634 a mihcaan malingatu". ayaw matineng mu-han-mu-te u singanganay nu midiputay atu cabay malalais, uyza i likisiay u situngusay, u sakalilidan sa ci Ha-li-ba. ś≠źÁĎ™Áąĺ¬∑Ť≥ď¬∑ŚďąŚ°ĒŚćú(/'o äm…Ďňźr/; ťėŅśčČšľĮŤ™ě:ōĻŔÖōĪ ō®ŔÜ ōßŔĄōģō∑ōßō®‚Äé 'Umar ibn al-KhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀb (' ēom…Ďr-, ' ē äm…Ďr …™bn alx…Ďtň§'tň§…Ďňźb)Ôľõ584ŚĻī‚ÄĒ644ŚĻī11śúą3śó•), . i 634 a mihca 8 a bulad 23 a demiad ci-Mu-han-mu-te a wama ciA-pu.Pa-ke-al "632 katukuh 634 a mihcaan tu zikuz, mala tatengaay tu Ha-li-baay a sakatusa a Ha-li-ba. u satinengay nu Mu-s-lin a ba-sye-cya ciniza, atu u mucelay cayay pisakinihay kasingangan, namahiza izaw ci Al-Farooq "Ow-ba-lu-ke, u matinengay pasasizuma tu lacusay u kapahay a tademaw" a ngangan. yi-s-lan migingkiway tu likisi hinapangangan han Ow-ma-al i-se, zayhan zikuz ci Ow-ma-ya hungti a zidayay ci Ha-li-na-Ow-may-al al-se atu izaw ku malecaday a ngangan niza. Al-Farooq ÁöĄÁ®ĪŤôü. . i pikuwan ni Ow-may-al, ci Ha-li-ba-kow sadadawa sa malahad, mikuwan tu Sa-san a hungtian a zidayan tulu a hun tu tusaay a Pay-can-tin-ti-Kow. ciniza sakay Sa-san a hungtian a pilaiisn caay ka katukuh tu tusaay a mihcaan pahezek tu mademec tu ku I-s-lan, "642 a mihcaan katukuh tu 644 a mihcaan. kilul tu lalay nu Yu-tay, hulaken ni Ow-may-al ku kilisetu tu sakay Yu-tay a tademaw tu pisatezep tu kawaw, misulul tuhenian taluma' i Ye-lu-sa-len, misulul mibaung tuhenian. ci Ow-may-al sazikuzay i cahelan tu 644 a mihcaan mapatay nu Pow-s a tademaw ci A-pu.Lu-e-lu-a.Bey-lu-ce. masakapah a nikauzipśó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ Ci Ow-ma-al lecuh i May-cya, masakapah henay u pasiziay atu misiwbayay a tademaw, u cayay ka kakitaan a luma' balaki. u wama niza ci Ha-ta-PU.i-Pen.Nu-ba-i nilecuh u tatungusay a labu nu luma' yadah ku singku. i cayay henay kacakat a ziday, u kapahay ku nipasubana cinizaan u kuntaw nalimaan, saaca kizemu ku uzip. kanahatu ci Ow-ma-al u kasikazan nu katuuday namakaniay kakitaanay a luma'. nika ciniza tu zumaay a Ku-lay-sen a tademaw u malecaday tu. i I-s-lan ayaw nu pisabaluhay nu kiwkay ci Ow-ma-al ci Ku-lay-sen uyza u cayay ku mahicaay a tademaw nu niyazu'. . yu ci Mu-han-mu-te malingatu malindusi hawsa, ci Ow-ma-al saicelang sa miading ci A-la-pow a laylay nu yadahay a sinzya. saicelang sa ciniza mabidang ci Mu-han-mu-tean, a kalamkam sa misawacu ci Mu-a-linan. i kasumamadan a nakamuan, ci Ow-ma-al tuwaca mahiza tu mipacuk ci Mu-han-mu-taan. cacay micaliwayay a Mu-s-lin musakamu cinizaan sakapahay ayaw misakapah tu nu uzipay a labuay a kawaw nu luma, zayhan itawya ci Ow-ma-al a sabana atu ali hatu mikelid tu I-s-lan-cyaw. yu katukuh puenengan nu sabana niza hawsa, maazih niza ciniza atu acawa niza miasip tu Mu-han-te a dadiw "ayzaay a ku-lan-cin a nisulitan a sadadiw". malinges tu ciniza, ciniza atu ali niza malalebu tu. sabana niza amiading tu acawa maduka ni Ow-ma-al, yu maazih niza maizang hawsa, pasazikuc ku balucu' ni Ow-ma-al. sakay a misungaan ku balucu', ci Ow-ma-al muasip tu nangatuan nu sabana niza tu nasawniay a niasipan a dadiw. sakukamu zayhan masumad nunian a dadiw ku balucu', ci Ow-ma-al uya a dimiad mikilul tuway tu I-s-lan-cyaw. yu ci Ow-ma-al pasaza ci Ku-la-sen binacaan a tumuk Abu Jahl pasakamu cinizaan pasumad tu sinzya a kawaw zikuz, u kamu malinges ku tumuk cinizaan, "tima'en nu Di'tu kisu!"ci Ow-ma-al namakayza pabinawlan i Ke-al-pay miinuli tu I-s-lan-cyaw, niyazu'ay a tumuk ci Su-bu-yang atu Abu Jahl namakayni malinges uyzasa u eneng miazih. Ow-ma-al a wayway ci mu-a-lin tu pabinawlan pitinak macunus ku kasibalucu', zayhan nayay ku mitena'ay a tademaw tu piinuli ni Ow-ma-al. A-pu.Pa-ke-al apuyu' ku kalasakakaay, u kasitungus niza tu kawaw hatu macalap nu miliyasay a sinzya nu kalalais, uyni a kalalaisan zuma a niyazu' sibalucu' a milaliw tu masakaputay a Mu-s-lin. Ow-ma-al itawya u angangan a kumung ci Pa-ke-al. A-pu.Pa-ke-al i 634 a mihcaan mapatay zikuz, patucek han mala micalukay ci Ow-ma-al. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ow-ma-ar~…ĺ.pin.ńßa-ta-pu ow-ma-ar~…ĺ.pin.ńßa-ta-pu "/ Ē~ °o*m**r/; a-r~…ĺa-pow:*** ** ******* Ē~ °umar ibn ar~…ĺ-kńßa***b ( Ē~ °*om*r-, Ē~ °**m*r *bn ar~…ĺ**t* Ē~ °t***b)**** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß *** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad" pab…ôr~…ĺin…ôn a ¶a ow-maj-ar~…ĺ, ow-ma-ar~…ĺ,wo-ma-ja, u ij-s-r~…ĺan- ¶ja i r~…ĺikisiaj s…ôpat tabakiaj a ńßa-r~…ĺi-baaj nu sakatusa a ir~…ĺu ¶ "*** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu". ajaw matin…ôŇč mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô u siŇčaŇčanaj nu midiputaj atu ¶abaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺais, ujza i r~…ĺikisiaj u situŇčusaj, u sakar~…ĺir~…ĺidan sa ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba. *********(/ Ē~ °o*m**r/; ****:*** ** ******* Ē~ °umar ibn ar~…ĺ-kńßa***b ( Ē~ °*om*r-, Ē~ °**m*r *bn ar~…ĺ**t* Ē~ °t***b)***************), . i *** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ¶i-mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô a wama ¶ia-pu.pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ "*** katukuńß *** a mińß ¶aan tu zikuz, mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj tu ńßa-r~…ĺi-baaj a sakatusa a ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba. u satin…ôŇčaj nu mu-s-r~…ĺin a ba-sj…ô- ¶ja ¶iniza, atu u mu ¶…ôr~…ĺaj ¶ajaj pisakinińßaj kasiŇčaŇčan, namańßiza izaw ¶i ar~…ĺ-faroo* "ow-ba-r~…ĺu-k…ô, u matin…ôŇčaj pasasizuma tu r~…ĺa ¶usaj u kapańßaj a tad…ômaw" a ŇčaŇčan. ji-s-r~…ĺan migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi ńßinapaŇčaŇčan ńßan ow-ma-ar~…ĺ i-s…ô, zajńßan zikuz ¶i ow-ma-ja ńßuŇčti a zidajaj ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-na-ow-maj-ar~…ĺ ar~…ĺ-s…ô atu izaw ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan niza. ar~…ĺ-faroo* ***. . i pikuwan ni ow-maj-ar~…ĺ, ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba-kow sadadawa sa mar~…ĺańßad, mikuwan tu sa-san a ńßuŇčtian a zidajan tur~…ĺu a ńßun tu tusaaj a paj- ¶an-tin-ti-kow. ¶iniza sakaj sa-san a ńßuŇčtian a pir~…ĺaiisn ¶aaj ka katukuńß tu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk tu mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu ku i-s-r~…ĺan, "*** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu *** a mińß ¶aan. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ju-taj, ńßur~…ĺak…ôn ni ow-maj-ar~…ĺ ku kir~…ĺis…ôtu tu sakaj ju-taj a tad…ômaw tu pisat…ôz…ôp tu kawaw, misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tuńß…ônian tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, misur~…ĺur~…ĺ mibauŇč tuńß…ônian. ¶i ow-maj-ar~…ĺ sazikuzaj i ¶ańß…ôr~…ĺan tu *** a mińß ¶aan mapataj nu pow-s a tad…ômaw ¶i a-pu.r~…ĺu-…ô-r~…ĺu-a.b…ô-r~…ĺu- ¶…ô. masakapańß a nikauzip**** ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i maj- ¶ja, masakapańß ńß…ônaj u pasiziaj atu misiwbajaj a tad…ômaw, u ¶ajaj ka kakitaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° bar~…ĺaki. u wama niza ¶i ńßa-ta-pu.i-p…ôn.nu-ba-i nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß u tatuŇčusaj a r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° jadańß ku siŇčku. i ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj ka ¶akat a zidaj, u kapańßaj ku nipasubana ¶inizaan u kuntaw nar~…ĺimaan, saa ¶a kiz…ômu ku uzip. kanańßatu ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ u kasikazan nu katuudaj namakaniaj kakitaanaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. nika ¶iniza tu zumaaj a ku-r~…ĺaj-s…ôn a tad…ômaw u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu. i i-s-r~…ĺan ajaw nu pisabar~…ĺuńßaj nu kiwkaj ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ ¶i ku-r~…ĺaj-s…ôn ujza u ¶ajaj ku mańßi ¶aaj a tad…ômaw nu nijazu Ē~ °. . ju ¶i mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺindusi ńßawsa, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa miadiŇč ¶i a-r~…ĺa-pow a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu jadańßaj a sinzja. sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa ¶iniza mabidaŇč ¶i mu-ńßan-mu-t…ôan, a kar~…ĺamkam sa misawa ¶u ¶i mu-a-r~…ĺinan. i kasumamadan a nakamuan, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ tuwa ¶a mańßiza tu mipa ¶uk ¶i mu-ńßan-mu-taan. ¶a ¶aj mi ¶ar~…ĺiwajaj a mu-s-r~…ĺin musakamu ¶inizaan sakapańßaj ajaw misakapańß tu nu uzipaj a r~…ĺabuaj a kawaw nu r~…ĺuma, zajńßan itawja ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ a sabana atu ar~…ĺi ńßatu mik…ôr~…ĺid tu i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw. ju katukuńß pu…ôn…ôŇčan nu sabana niza ńßawsa, maazińß niza ¶iniza atu a ¶awa niza miasip tu mu-ńßan-t…ô a dadiw "ajzaaj a ku-r~…ĺan- ¶in a nisur~…ĺitan a sadadiw". mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs tu ¶iniza, ¶iniza atu ar~…ĺi niza mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu. sabana niza amiadiŇč tu a ¶awa maduka ni ow-ma-ar~…ĺ, ju maazińß niza maizaŇč ńßawsa, pasaziku ¶ ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ni ow-ma-ar~…ĺ. sakaj a misuŇčaan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ muasip tu naŇčatuan nu sabana niza tu nasawniaj a niasipan a dadiw. sakukamu zajńßan masumad nunian a dadiw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ uja a dimiad mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tuwaj tu i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw. ju ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ pasaza ¶i ku-r~…ĺa-s…ôn bina ¶aan a tumuk abu *ańßr~…ĺ pasakamu ¶inizaan pasumad tu sinzja a kawaw zikuz, u kamu mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku tumuk ¶inizaan, "tima Ē~ °…ôn nu di Ē~ °tu kisu!" ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ namakajza pabinawr~…ĺan i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-paj miinur~…ĺi tu i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw, nijazu Ē~ °aj a tumuk ¶i su-bu-jaŇč atu abu *ańßr~…ĺ namakajni mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ujzasa u …ôn…ôŇč miazińß. ow-ma-ar~…ĺ a wajwaj ¶i mu-a-r~…ĺin tu pabinawr~…ĺan pitinak ma ¶unus ku kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, zajńßan najaj ku mit…ôna Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu piinur~…ĺi ni ow-ma-ar~…ĺ. a-pu.pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ apuju Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺasakakaaj, u kasituŇčus niza tu kawaw ńßatu ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu mir~…ĺijasaj a sinzja nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, ujni a kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan zuma a nijazu Ē~ ° sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu masakaputaj a mu-s-r~…ĺin. ow-ma-ar~…ĺ itawja u aŇčaŇčan a kumuŇč ¶i pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ. a-pu.pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ i *** a mińß ¶aan mapataj zikuz, patu ¶…ôk ńßan mar~…ĺa mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ow-ma-al.Pin.Ha-ta-pu Ow-ma-al.Pin.Ha-ta-pu "/'o äm…Ďňźr/; A-la-pow:ōĻŔÖōĪ ō®ŔÜ ōßŔĄōģō∑ōßō®‚Äé 'Umar ibn al-KhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀb (' ēom…Ďr-, ' ē äm…Ďr …™bn alx…Ďtň§'tň§…Ďňźb)Ôľõ584 a mihcaan katukuh 644 a mihca 11 a bulad 3 a demiad" pabelinen aca Ow-may-al, Ow-ma-al,Wo-ma-ya, u Iy-s-lan-cya i likisiay sepat tabakiay a Ha-li-baay nu sakatusa a iluc "634 a mihcaan malingatu". ayaw matineng mu-han-mu-te u singanganay nu midiputay atu cabay malalais, uyza i likisiay u situngusay, u sakalilidan sa ci Ha-li-ba. ś≠źÁĎ™Áąĺ¬∑Ť≥ď¬∑ŚďąŚ°ĒŚćú(/'o äm…Ďňźr/; ťėŅśčČšľĮŤ™ě:ōĻŔÖōĪ ō®ŔÜ ōßŔĄōģō∑ōßō®‚Äé 'Umar ibn al-KhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀb (' ēom…Ďr-, ' ē äm…Ďr …™bn alx…Ďtň§'tň§…Ďňźb)Ôľõ584ŚĻī‚ÄĒ644ŚĻī11śúą3śó•), . i 634 a mihca 8 a bulad 23 a demiad ci-Mu-han-mu-te a wama ciA-pu.Pa-ke-al "632 katukuh 634 a mihcaan tu zikuz, mala tatengaay tu Ha-li-baay a sakatusa a Ha-li-ba. u satinengay nu Mu-s-lin a ba-sye-cya ciniza, atu u mucelay cayay pisakinihay kasingangan, namahiza izaw ci Al-Farooq "Ow-ba-lu-ke, u matinengay pasasizuma tu lacusay u kapahay a tademaw" a ngangan. yi-s-lan migingkiway tu likisi hinapangangan han Ow-ma-al i-se, zayhan zikuz ci Ow-ma-ya hungti a zidayay ci Ha-li-na-Ow-may-al al-se atu izaw ku malecaday a ngangan niza. Al-Farooq ÁöĄÁ®ĪŤôü. . i pikuwan ni Ow-may-al, ci Ha-li-ba-kow sadadawa sa malahad, mikuwan tu Sa-san a hungtian a zidayan tulu a hun tu tusaay a Pay-can-tin-ti-Kow. ciniza sakay Sa-san a hungtian a pilaiisn caay ka katukuh tu tusaay a mihcaan pahezek tu mademec tu ku I-s-lan, "642 a mihcaan katukuh tu 644 a mihcaan. kilul tu lalay nu Yu-tay, hulaken ni Ow-may-al ku kilisetu tu sakay Yu-tay a tademaw tu pisatezep tu kawaw, misulul tuhenian taluma' i Ye-lu-sa-len, misulul mibaung tuhenian. ci Ow-may-al sazikuzay i cahelan tu 644 a mihcaan mapatay nu Pow-s a tademaw ci A-pu.Lu-e-lu-a.Bey-lu-ce. masakapah a nikauzipśó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ Ci Ow-ma-al lecuh i May-cya, masakapah henay u pasiziay atu misiwbayay a tademaw, u cayay ka kakitaan a luma' balaki. u wama niza ci Ha-ta-PU.i-Pen.Nu-ba-i nilecuh u tatungusay a labu nu luma' yadah ku singku. i cayay henay kacakat a ziday, u kapahay ku nipasubana cinizaan u kuntaw nalimaan, saaca kizemu ku uzip. kanahatu ci Ow-ma-al u kasikazan nu katuuday namakaniay kakitaanay a luma'. nika ciniza tu zumaay a Ku-lay-sen a tademaw u malecaday tu. i I-s-lan ayaw nu pisabaluhay nu kiwkay ci Ow-ma-al ci Ku-lay-sen uyza u cayay ku mahicaay a tademaw nu niyazu'. . yu ci Mu-han-mu-te malingatu malindusi hawsa, ci Ow-ma-al saicelang sa miading ci A-la-pow a laylay nu yadahay a sinzya. saicelang sa ciniza mabidang ci Mu-han-mu-tean, a kalamkam sa misawacu ci Mu-a-linan. i kasumamadan a nakamuan, ci Ow-ma-al tuwaca mahiza tu mipacuk ci Mu-han-mu-taan. cacay micaliwayay a Mu-s-lin musakamu cinizaan sakapahay ayaw misakapah tu nu uzipay a labuay a kawaw nu luma, zayhan itawya ci Ow-ma-al a sabana atu ali hatu mikelid tu I-s-lan-cyaw. yu katukuh puenengan nu sabana niza hawsa, maazih niza ciniza atu acawa niza miasip tu Mu-han-te a dadiw "ayzaay a ku-lan-cin a nisulitan a sadadiw". malinges tu ciniza, ciniza atu ali niza malalebu tu. sabana niza amiading tu acawa maduka ni Ow-ma-al, yu maazih niza maizang hawsa, pasazikuc ku balucu' ni Ow-ma-al. sakay a misungaan ku balucu', ci Ow-ma-al muasip tu nangatuan nu sabana niza tu nasawniay a niasipan a dadiw. sakukamu zayhan masumad nunian a dadiw ku balucu', ci Ow-ma-al uya a dimiad mikilul tuway tu I-s-lan-cyaw. yu ci Ow-ma-al pasaza ci Ku-la-sen binacaan a tumuk Abu Jahl pasakamu cinizaan pasumad tu sinzya a kawaw zikuz, u kamu malinges ku tumuk cinizaan, "tima'en nu Di'tu kisu!"ci Ow-ma-al namakayza pabinawlan i Ke-al-pay miinuli tu I-s-lan-cyaw, niyazu'ay a tumuk ci Su-bu-yang atu Abu Jahl namakayni malinges uyzasa u eneng miazih. Ow-ma-al a wayway ci mu-a-lin tu pabinawlan pitinak macunus ku kasibalucu', zayhan nayay ku mitena'ay a tademaw tu piinuli ni Ow-ma-al. A-pu.Pa-ke-al apuyu' ku kalasakakaay, u kasitungus niza tu kawaw hatu macalap nu miliyasay a sinzya nu kalalais, uyni a kalalaisan zuma a niyazu' sibalucu' a milaliw tu masakaputay a Mu-s-lin. Ow-ma-al itawya u angangan a kumung ci Pa-ke-al. A-pu.Pa-ke-al i 634 a mihcaan mapatay zikuz, patucek han mala micalukay ci Ow-ma-al. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

sakatusa a ir~…ĺu ¶ "*** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu". ajaw matin…ôŇč mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô u siŇčaŇčanaj nu midiputaj atu ¶abaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺais, ujza i r~…ĺikisiaj u situŇčusaj, u sakar~…ĺir~…ĺidan sa ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba. *********(/ Ē~ °o*m**r/; ****:*** ** ******* Ē~ °umar ibn ar~…ĺ-kńßa***b ( Ē~ °*om*r-, Ē~ °**m*r *bn ar~…ĺ**t* Ē~ °t***b)***************), . i *** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ¶i-mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô a wama ¶ia-pu.pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ "*** katukuńß *** a mińß ¶aan tu zikuz, mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj tu ńßa-r~…ĺi-baaj a sakatusa a ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba. u satin…ôŇčaj nu mu-s-r~…ĺin a ba-sj…ô- ¶ja ¶iniza, atu u mu ¶…ôr~…ĺaj ¶ajaj pisakinińßaj kasiŇčaŇčan, namańßiza izaw ¶i ar~…ĺ-faroo* "ow-ba-r~…ĺu-k…ô, u matin…ôŇčaj pasasizuma tu r~…ĺa ¶usaj u kapańßaj a tad…ômaw" a ŇčaŇčan. ji-s-r~…ĺan migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi ńßinapaŇčaŇčan ńßan ow-ma-ar~…ĺ i-s…ô, zajńßan zikuz ¶i ow-ma-ja ńßuŇčti a zidajaj ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-na-ow-maj-ar~…ĺ ar~…ĺ-s…ô atu izaw ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan niza. ar~…ĺ-faroo* ***. . i pikuwan ni ow-maj-ar~…ĺ, ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-ba-kow sadadawa sa mar~…ĺańßad, mikuwan tu sa-san a ńßuŇčtian a zidajan tur~…ĺu a ńßun tu tusaaj a paj- ¶an-tin-ti-kow. ¶iniza sakaj sa-san a ńßuŇčtian a pir~…ĺaiisn ¶aaj ka katukuńß tu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk tu mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu ku i-s-r~…ĺan, "*** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu *** a mińß ¶aan. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ju-taj, ńßur~…ĺak…ôn ni ow-maj-ar~…ĺ ku kir~…ĺis…ôtu tu sakaj ju-taj a tad…ômaw tu pisat…ôz…ôp tu kawaw, misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tuńß…ônian tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i j…ô-r~…ĺu-sa-r~…ĺ…ôn, misur~…ĺur~…ĺ mibauŇč tuńß…ônian. ¶i ow-maj-ar~…ĺ sazikuzaj i ¶ańß…ôr~…ĺan tu *** a mińß ¶aan mapataj nu pow-s a tad…ômaw ¶i a-pu.r~…ĺu-…ô-r~…ĺu-a.b…ô-r~…ĺu- ¶…ô. masakapańß a nikauzip**** ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i maj- ¶ja, masakapańß ńß…ônaj u pasiziaj atu misiwbajaj a tad…ômaw, u ¶ajaj ka kakitaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° bar~…ĺaki. u wama niza ¶i ńßa-ta-pu.i-p…ôn.nu-ba-i nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß u tatuŇčusaj a r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° jadańß ku siŇčku. i ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj ka ¶akat a zidaj, u kapańßaj ku nipasubana ¶inizaan u kuntaw nar~…ĺimaan, saa ¶a kiz…ômu ku uzip. kanańßatu ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ u kasikazan nu katuudaj namakaniaj kakitaanaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. nika ¶iniza tu zumaaj a ku-r~…ĺaj-s…ôn a tad…ômaw u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu. i i-s-r~…ĺan ajaw nu pisabar~…ĺuńßaj nu kiwkaj ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ ¶i ku-r~…ĺaj-s…ôn ujza u ¶ajaj ku mańßi ¶aaj a tad…ômaw nu nijazu Ē~ °. . ju ¶i mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺindusi ńßawsa, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa miadiŇč ¶i a-r~…ĺa-pow a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu jadańßaj a sinzja. sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa ¶iniza mabidaŇč ¶i mu-ńßan-mu-t…ôan, a kar~…ĺamkam sa misawa ¶u ¶i mu-a-r~…ĺinan. i kasumamadan a nakamuan, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ tuwa ¶a mańßiza tu mipa ¶uk ¶i mu-ńßan-mu-taan. ¶a ¶aj mi ¶ar~…ĺiwajaj a mu-s-r~…ĺin musakamu ¶inizaan sakapańßaj ajaw misakapańß tu nu uzipaj a r~…ĺabuaj a kawaw nu r~…ĺuma, zajńßan itawja ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ a sabana atu ar~…ĺi ńßatu mik…ôr~…ĺid tu i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw. ju katukuńß pu…ôn…ôŇčan nu sabana niza ńßawsa, maazińß niza ¶iniza atu a ¶awa niza miasip tu mu-ńßan-t…ô a dadiw "ajzaaj a ku-r~…ĺan- ¶in a nisur~…ĺitan a sadadiw". mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs tu ¶iniza, ¶iniza atu ar~…ĺi niza mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu. sabana niza amiadiŇč tu a ¶awa maduka ni ow-ma-ar~…ĺ, ju maazińß niza maizaŇč ńßawsa, pasaziku ¶ ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ni ow-ma-ar~…ĺ. sakaj a misuŇčaan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ muasip tu naŇčatuan nu sabana niza tu nasawniaj a niasipan a dadiw. sakukamu zajńßan masumad nunian a dadiw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ uja a dimiad mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tuwaj tu i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw. ju ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ pasaza ¶i ku-r~…ĺa-s…ôn bina ¶aan a tumuk abu *ańßr~…ĺ pasakamu ¶inizaan pasumad tu sinzja a kawaw zikuz, u kamu mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku tumuk ¶inizaan, "tima Ē~ °…ôn nu di Ē~ °tu kisu!" ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ namakajza pabinawr~…ĺan i k…ô-ar~…ĺ-paj miinur~…ĺi tu i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw, nijazu Ē~ °aj a tumuk ¶i su-bu-jaŇč atu abu *ańßr~…ĺ namakajni mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ujzasa u …ôn…ôŇč miazińß. ow-ma-ar~…ĺ a wajwaj ¶i mu-a-r~…ĺin tu pabinawr~…ĺan pitinak ma ¶unus ku kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, zajńßan najaj ku mit…ôna Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu piinur~…ĺi ni ow-ma-ar~…ĺ. a-pu.pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ apuju Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺasakakaaj, u kasituŇčus niza tu kawaw ńßatu ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu mir~…ĺijasaj a sinzja nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, ujni a kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan zuma a nijazu Ē~ ° sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu masakaputaj a mu-s-r~…ĺin. ow-ma-ar~…ĺ itawja u aŇčaŇčan a kumuŇč ¶i pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ. a-pu.pa-k…ô-ar~…ĺ i *** a mińß ¶aan mapataj zikuz, patu ¶…ôk ńßan mar~…ĺa mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj ¶i ow-ma-ar~…ĺ. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
